description_long: This is an adult pedestrian dressed in urban outerwear, featuring a long, double-breasted coat with metallic buckle details on the sleeves and front. The individual wears a hooded sweatshirt underneath the coat, and a wide-brimmed bucket hat that partially shades the face. The hands are covered with fingerless gloves, and the pants are slim-fitting, tucked into sturdy, lace-up combat boots. The figure's stance is relaxed but upright, with arms slightly outstretched and fingers splayed. The overall appearance suggests a modern, streetwise style suitable for city environments.
description: An adult in a long coat, hooded sweatshirt, bucket hat, fingerless gloves, and combat boots, exuding a modern urban style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full outfit, including the coat's details, hood, gloves, and facial features under the hat.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hat, coat's length, and boot details.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the coat, hood, and boots, with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the coat's side, glove, and boot profile.
attribute_clothing_type: long double-breasted coat, hooded sweatshirt, fingerless gloves, slim pants
